title: --sudo option: 6-layer elevation architecture with pulse tracing (v5.14)
desc: --sudo is a SESSION START trigger. Launcher first checks admin Eye liveness and can reuse an existing admin Eye. Core/SudoHandler owns admin spawning and waits indefinitely after UAC until the admin Eye is ready OR the spawned admin process dies (STATUS_DLL_INIT_FAILED etc). Once the admin path has started, there is no user-mode fallback; proxy failure aborts. User Eye (pipe: WKAppBotCmdPipe) refuses --sudo with [EYE:FALLBACK] + exit 125. Pipe names are FIXED: admin=wkappbot_elevated, user=WKAppBotCmdPipe. IsAvailable→Ping migration for liveness.
steps: SEMANTIC MODEL — --sudo is a SESSION START, not per-invocation. Once admin Eye (pipe wkappbot_elevated) is up, subsequent commands should inherit admin privilege without re-typing --sudo. Like shell sudo. This means Launcher should prefer admin pipe over user pipe when admin Eye is alive.
author: claude
